label: Writlock Store
description: Writlock Store forms a narrow, vaulted storage chamber set behind the patched ashlar of The Mortared Rooms, its masonry seams left exposed where successive refoundings meet. Shelving of rough planed timber lines the walls in disciplined tiers, supporting lidded crocks, cord-bound bundles, and oilcloth-wrapped packets intended for long keeping in a city of frequent requisition. A pegged rail carries sealed tags and blank tally slips beside a small, lockable strongbox shelf, reflecting Varric Holdfast’s habits of licensing, inspection, and record custody. The floor remains uneven in mismatched flagstone, with lime mortar drips and soot staining that mark the building’s smoke-darkened, service-first character.
